nasb.text: Then the chief priests and the elders of the people were gathered together in the court of the high priest, named Caiaphas;

esv.text: Then the chief priests and the elders of the people gathered in the palace of the high priest, whose name was Caiaphas,

cnv.text: 那時，祭司長和民間的長老聚集在大祭司該亞法的官邸，

ccb.text: 那时，祭司长和民间的长老正聚集在大祭司该亚法的府里，

csbs.text: 那时，祭司长们和民间的长老们聚集在叫该亚法的大祭司的宅院里，
